svg.title: Tiling and ping-pong BRAM buffering
svg.desc: Matrix A with highlighted A-tile feeds left. Matrix B with B-tile feeds top. Both stream into ping-pong BRAM banks on the right. PE Array consumes banks and accumulates into C tile. Annotation shows overlapped prefetch and compute.
svg.text: Overlapped prefetch + compute scheduling — ping-pong buffers hide DDR latency behind PE computation
Banks swap roles every tile iteration: compute bank ↔ prefetch bank alternate each cycle
